response.justification: Candidate is dramatically overqualified for a junior/mid-level role — a Staff Software Engineer with 15+ years of experience including senior and staff positions at multiple companies. While the technical skills (TypeScript, Node.js, React, PostgreSQL exposure via SQL) align well and Berlin location matches the on-site requirement, the seniority mismatch creates significant risk of retention issues, salary expectation gaps, and dissatisfaction with entry-level responsibilities. No explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience shown, though MongoDB and Node.js backgrounds transfer.
strengths: Strong TypeScript, Node.js, and React experience across multiple senior roles
Based in Berlin matching on-site requirement; fullstack breadth across DB to UI
Exposure to AI/LLM agent infrastructure aligns with nice-to-have qualifications
concerns: Massive seniority mismatch — Staff/Senior engineer applying for entry-level position
Likely salary expectations far exceed junior role budget
No explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience; primary DB background is MongoDB
